# YellowMarket

> YellowMarket builds AI growth systems for local businesses and high-value professionals: conversion-focused websites, Google visibility, lead capture, booking flows, and high-leverage AI workflows for expensive moments like calls, quoting, intake, follow-up, and hiring.

## Primary URL
- https://yellowmarket.store/

## Contact
- Email: contact@yellowmarket.store
- Phone: +1 (202) 773-7868
- Entity: YellowMarket LLC, Wyoming, USA

## Services
- AI Website + Local Trust System: mobile-first business website, service pages, trust signals, click-to-call/contact paths, and schema markup.
- Google Visibility: Google Business Profile cleanup checklist, review capture flow, local SEO structure, and service-area clarity.
- Lead Follow-Up Automation: missed-call text-back, instant intake forms, booking reminders, analytics/tracking, and simple CRM handoff.
- High-Leverage AI Workflows: first-to-know alerts, quote-from-field workflows, client intake engines, after-hours front desk, and candidate shortlisting.

## Typical process
1. Free revenue leak audit.
2. Leak map ranked by likely impact and speed to fix.
3. Fixed-scope pilot package.
4. Launch, verify basics, then decide whether maintenance or deeper automation has ROI.

## Useful pages
- Homepage: https://yellowmarket.store/
- Trade business demo: https://yellowmarket.store/demos/mz-plumbing-4-you/
